name: 100 Blacksmith Cats
short_description: 🐾 Join the cutest adventure in themed locations full of cats! 😻 Explore the charming hand-drawn artwork of special places and try to find 100 adorable cats hidden throughout the game. 🐈🕵️‍♂️ Can you find them all? 🕵️‍♂️🐈
detailed_description:
🐾 WELCOME TO ANOTHER ONE OF 100 CATS SERIES GAME 🐈

Join the cutest adventure in the world full of cats! Explore the charming hand-drawn artwork of special themed locations as you embark on a quest to find 100 adorable cats hidden throughout the game.
Test your attention and observation skills in this cozy and delightful hidden object game.
Each cat is more charming than the last, and every discovery brings a smile to your face.

🐈🕵️‍♂️ Can you find them all? 🕵️‍♂️🐈

Key Features

  • 🎮 1 Level
  • 🐈 100 Hidden Cats
  • 🎵 Awesome Soundtrack
  • 🎨 High Quality Resolution Artworks
  • 🌗 Brightness Settings
  • 💾 Progress Saves
  • 🔍 Zoom
  • 😺 Real Meow Sounds!
  • 💥 Combo Counter!
  • 💡 Tips
  • 🌐 No Text

reviews.review_text:
[H1]100 Blacksmith (Allegedly) Cats[/H1]

One forge, 100 cats... and an uncommon definition of a cat which is “two dots on a random blob.” I’m back in the ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ building again with another 100 Cozy Games entry, and once again it’s a bit of Russian roulette for my sanity. It's supposed to be simple enough: one level, find 100 cats. That's it. But here you’ll spend most of the time wondering how any of these shapes qualify as a feline.

To be fair, the usual options are here. There are brightness settings, sound sliders, a good zoom, and a hint system that doesn’t interfere with achievements. Progression is straightforward and at least this time nothing bugged out. The colors and textures do add a tiny bit of visual challenge, although most of the “difficulty” really comes from the fact that none of the supposed cats look like cats.

The rest is where things fall apart fast. It’s wildly overpriced for what it offers (as usual), and the whole thing takes about 3 minutes to complete, for 100 cats that barely resemble anything. The achievement spam is still present too, and since Steam is “learning about this game,” the achievements won’t even show up on your profile showcases. I even had to let the game run in the background while writing this, [i]again[/i] which really says everything about the experience. Not worth the time, nor the money sadly.

[quote]For more reviews like this one, please check out [url=https://store.steampowered.com/curator/45639970-Ele%2527s-Little-Recommendation-Corner/][b]Ele's Little Recommendation Corner[/b][/url]![/quote]

[h3] [b] 100 BLACKSMITH CATS [/b] [/h3]

Relaxing and funny game where you just need to find 100 hidden cats. Once you find them all, you just completed the whole game. Sounds easy right? Some cats are really tough to find but you will figure it out. If you can´t find some of them there is hint system that will help you. Art and music fits together nicely. In case you are still missing some cats, just take a look at my guide. :)

Overall it is a good game to decompress. If you have good eyes for seeking it will take you about 15 minutes to 30 minutes at maximum. Also you will get easily those achievements. GL & HF.
Meh- Just the average hidden cat game. Not much gameplay. Completed the game in around 5 minutes.
